title: polygala koi
intro: Polygala koi, also known as Yuan Zhi or Polygala root, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Polygala koi are attributed to its rich content of saponins, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Polygala koi is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also used in herbal supplements, tinctures, and capsules to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost overall well-being.
